debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ∏ p ∈ ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow, ∑' (k : ℕ), (↑p ^ k)⁻¹ ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1))

        simp only [add_tsub_cancel_right]
        have : ∏ k ∈ range (primeCountingReal x), (nth Nat.Prime k : ℝ) / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) =

        exact sub_le_self p 1

let n := primeCountingReal x
        have h_subset : primesBelow ⌊x⌋.natAbs ⊆ (Icc 1 n).image (fun k ↦ nth Nat.Prime (k - 1)) := by
          intro p hp
          rw [mem_image]
          use primeCounting p
          constructor
          · rw [mem_Icc]
            refine ⟨Nat.succ_le_of_lt (primeCounting_pos_of_prime (prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)), ?_⟩
            apply primeCounting_mono
            exact le_of_lt (mem_primesBelow.mp hp)
          · exact (Nat.nth_prime_primeCounting_sub_one (prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)).symm
        refine le_trans (prod_le_prod_of_subset_of_one_le h_subset ?_) (prod_image ?_).ge
        · intro p hp
          apply one_le_div
          · exact sub_nonneg_of_le (Nat.cast_le.mpr (Prime.one_lt (prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)).le)
          · exact Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Prime.one_lt (prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)))
        · intro x _ y _ h
          apply Nat.pred_inj <;> try omega
          exact Nat.nth_injective Nat.Prime h

rw [← Finset.prod_image ⟨fun _ _ _ _ h ↦ by simpa using Nat.nth_injective _ Nat.Prime.infinite h⟩]
        refine Finset.prod_le_prod_of_subset_of_one_le (Finset.subset_iff.mpr ?_) (fun p hp ↦ ?_)
        · intro q hq
          simp only [Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_Icc, primesBelow, mem_filter, mem_range] at hq ⊢
          use primeCounting q
          constructor
          · constructor
            · exact (primeCounting_pos q).mpr ⟨q, hq.2, le_rfl⟩
            · rw [primeCountingReal, if_neg (by linarith)]
              apply primeCounting_mono
              exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_lt_of_le hq.1 (Nat.floor_le hxge))
          · simp [Nat.nth_count hq.2]
        · refine one_le_div_sub_one_of_pos (by norm_cast; exact Prime.one_lt (prime_of_mem_image.mp hp))

rw [← Finset.prod_Ico_eq_prod_range]
        have hx : 0 ≤ x := le_trans (Nat.cast_nonneg n) hxge
        have hn : ⌊x⌋₊ = n := Nat.floor_eq_on_Ico' n x hxge hxlt
        rw [primeCountingReal, if_neg (not_le_of_gt hx), hn]
        refine le_trans (prod_le_prod_of_subset_of_one_le ?_ ?_) (le_of_eq ?_)
        · intro p hp
          rw [mem_image]
          rw [primesBelow, mem_filter, mem_range] at hp
          let k := (filter Nat.Prime (range p)).card
          refine ⟨k, ?_, nth_prime k⟩
          rw [mem_Ico, zero_le, primeCounting, count, nth_prime k]
          exact ⟨card_lt_card_of_subset (filter_subset_filter _ (range_subset_range_of_range_subset (range_subset_range_add_right _))), rfl⟩
        · intro p hp _; apply one_le_div <;> norm_cast
          · exact zero_le _
          · rw [le_sub_iff_add_le]; exact Prime.two_le (mem_image.mp hp).2.2
        · refine prod_bij (fun k _ ↦ nth Nat.Prime k) (fun _ _ ↦ by simp) (fun _ _ ↦ by simp) (fun _ _ ↦ nth_injective Nat.Prime_infinite) ?_
          intro b hb; simp at hb; simp
          refine ⟨(filter Nat.Prime (range b)).card, ?_, nth_prime _⟩
          rw [primeCounting, count] at hb
          apply (card_le_card_of_subset (filter_subset_filter _ (range_subset_range_add_right _))).trans_lt
          rw [← count_eq_card_filter_range, primeCounting_eq_count_Prime] at hb
          exact hb

rw [primeCountingReal, Int.floor_natAbs, Nat.eq_iff_le_and_lt.mpr ⟨hxge, hxlt⟩]
        rw [← prod_primesBelow_eq_prod_range_nth]
        refine le_trans (prod_le_prod_of_subset_of_one_le' (primesBelow_mono (le_succ _)) ?_) ?_
        · intro p hp _
          exact one_le_div (Nat.sub_le p 1) (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Prime.two_le hp))
        · refine le_of_eq (prod_bij (fun i _ ↦ i + 1) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_)
          · intro a ha; rw [mem_Icc, mem_range] at ha ⊢; omega
          · intro a ha; simp
          · intro _ _ _ _ h; simp at h; exact h
          · intro b hb; use b - 1; rw [mem_Icc, mem_range] at hb ⊢; omega
      _ ≤ primeCountingReal x + 1 := by
        rw [← Nat.cast_one, ← Nat.cast_add, ← prod_const_one_add (primeCountingReal x),
           Nat.cast_prod, ← Icc_prod_natCast]
        refine prod_le_prod (fun k hk ↦ ?_) (fun k hk ↦ ?_)
        · positivity
        · rw [mem_Icc] at hk
          have hp := Nat.nth_prime_ge_add_one_of_one_le k
          have hpd : 0 < (nth Nat.Prime (k - 1) : ℝ) - 1 := by
             rw [sub_pos, Nat.cast_lt]
             exact Nat.lt_of_succ_le (le_trans (by omega) hp)
          rw [div_le_iff hpd, sub_add_cancel, add_one_mul, mul_sub_one,
              sub_le_iff_le_add, sub_add_cancel]
          norm_cast
          exact hp

rw [← Finset.prod_Ico_id_eq_prod_Icc, Finset.prod_Ico_eq_prod_range]
        simp only [add_tsub_cancel_right]
        rw [← Finset.prod_image (Nat.nth_injective Nat.Prime.infinite)]
        refine Finset.prod_le_prod_of_subset_of_one_le ?_ ?_
        · intro p hp
          rw [Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_range]
          exact ⟨primeCounting p - 1, Nat.pred_lt (primeCounting_pos.2 (mem_primesBelow.1 hp).2).ne'
            (primeCounting_le_primeCountingReal (le_of_lt (mem_primesBelow.1 hp).1)),
            Nat.nth_pred_primeCounting (mem_primesBelow.1 hp).2⟩
        · intro p hp
          exact one_le_div (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Prime.two_le (mem_primesBelow.1 hp).2)) (sub_le_self _ 1)

h))
              · exact ih
          exact this.trans (Nat.cast_le_cast.mpr (Nat.add_le_add_right (le_primeCounting _ _) _))

norm_cast; exact hp.one_lt
          rw [← inv_pow, tsum_geometric_of_lt_1 (le_of_lt (inv_pos.mpr (by linarith))) (inv_lt_one hp_one)]
          field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt hp_one)]

refine Finset.prod_le_prod_of_subset_of_one_le' (fun p hp ↦ ?_) (fun _ _ _ ↦ ?_)
        · rw [mem_primesBelow] at hp
          refine mem_image.mpr ⟨primeCounting p, mem_Icc.mpr ⟨primeCounting_pos hp.2, ?_⟩, nth_primeCounting hp.2⟩
          unfold primeCountingReal
          split_ifs with h
          · exact (not_lt_of_le (primeCounting_pos hp.2) h).elim
          · exact primeCounting_mono (le_floor (le_of_lt hp.1))
        · simp only [tsum_geometric_of_lt_one (inv_nonneg.mpr (cast_nonneg _)) (inv_lt_one (one_lt_cast.mpr (Prime.one_lt (nth Nat.Prime _))))]
          field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt (one_lt_cast.mpr (Prime.one_lt (nth Nat.Prime _))))]
      _ ≤ (∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), ((k + 1 : ℝ) / k)) := by
        refine Finset.prod_le_prod (fun _ _ ↦ by positivity) (fun k hk ↦ ?_)
        rw [div_le_div_iff (sub_pos_of_lt (one_lt_cast.mpr (Prime.one_lt (nth Nat.Prime _)))) (cast_pos.mpr (mem_Icc.mp hk).1)]
        norm_cast
        rw [← mul_sub_one, mul_comm, ← Nat.le_sub_one_iff_add_le (mul_pos (Prime.pos (nth Nat.Prime _)) (mem_Icc.mp hk).1)]
        exact Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (le_trans (add_le_add_right (mem_Icc.mp hk).1 1) (Nat.succ_le_nth _))
      _ = primeCountingReal x + 1 := by
        induction' (primeCountingReal x) with m hm
        · simp
        · rw [prod_Icc_succ_top (by omega), hm]
          field_simp; ring
